subcodes.title: Address to the Baha'is at 309 W 78th St in New York, 1912-06-13
subcodes.first_line: I have made you wait for a while, but as I was tired I slept a little. While I was sleeping... I desire distinction for you
subcodes.first_line_orig: خسته بودم قدری خوابیدم در خواب میدیدم که با شماها صحبت میدارم ولی بصوت جلی
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @unity in diversity, @excellence; distinction, @diversity an attribute; requirement of existence, @differences in human capacity
